narrative:
Marion Township has 1,409 registered voters, with 57.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.3 percentage points.
